approved_command_preview: Patch PR #296 branch only: fix python_path_expr_info single-argument Path dynamic-state handling, add focused regression coverage, run targeted Python selftests/py_compile/workflow validator, commit and push fix/dcoir-review-path-write-sentinel-290, then return checkout to main for exec cleanup.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$branch = 'fix/dcoir-review-path-write-sentinel-290'
Write-Host "Checking out PR branch $branch"
git config user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
git config user.email '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
git fetch origin $branch
git checkout -B $branch "origin/$branch"

$patchB64 = ''
$patchPath = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'patch_pr296_single_arg_path.py'
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($patchPath, [Convert]::FromBase64String($patchB64))
python $patchPath

Write-Host 'Running targeted validation'
python scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
python scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_selftest.py
python -m py_compile scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_selftest.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
python scripts/validate-codeql-security-workflow.py

git diff --check
$changed = git status --short
Write-Host "Changed files:"
Write-Host $changed
if (-not $changed) { throw 'expected source/test changes but git status is clean' }

git add scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
git commit -m 'Fix single-argument Path write sentinel coverage'
git push origin "HEAD:$branch"

Write-Host 'Returning checkout to main for chatgpt-exec report cleanup'
git fetch origin main
git checkout -B main origin/main
